name: launchdarkly-mcp
description: Connect Codex to LaunchDarkly over MCP: AI Configs and feature management (FM) hosted endpoints, plus bundled guidance for using the tools.

interface.shortDescription: Feature flags, AI Configs, and environments via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Use LaunchDarkly’s hosted MCP servers for AI Configs and FM, or run the same surface locally with npx @launchdarkly/mcp-server (see repository README). Authenticate with your LaunchDarkly API access token when prompted.
defaultPrompt: List my LaunchDarkly feature flags for this project.
Show AI Config targeting for the config I care about.
